person

Emeline Shaw

The Outcasts' leader, pursued from Roosevelt Island to a final confrontation at Manning National Zoo.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Manning National Zoo

Shaw's retreat turns Manning National Zoo into an Outcast strongpoint and the site of the Division's next confrontation with the faction's leadership. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft's Episode 1 mission brief identifies Emeline Shaw as the leader of the Outcasts. [1]

  2. confirmed

    After her defeat on Roosevelt Island, Shaw retreats into Manning National Zoo and is protected by Outcast followers and blockades. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: Manning National Zoo & Camp White Oak — Ubisoft (2019-07-23). Accessed 2026-07-19.
